bind.description: Address the bridge listens on inside the host or container.

publicUrl.description: External URL clients use to reach the bridge, especially behind a reverse proxy.

name.description: Server name shown to Jellyfin clients.

users.description: Users that can log into the bridge. Passwords are Argon2 hashes.

name.description: Bridge username. Using the same username upstream helps user-specific routes.

passwordHash.description: Argon2 password hash for the bridge login password.

upstreams.description: Real Jellyfin servers the bridge aggregates and proxies.

id.description: Stable local identifier used by library source mappings.

name.description: Human-readable upstream name. Also used for pass-through library prefixes.

url.description: Base URL of the upstream Jellyfin server.

token.description: Jellyfin API key. Environment variable references such as ${MAIN_JELLYFIN_TOKEN} are supported.

validateUpstreams.description: Validate upstream reachability and configured library ids before the bridge starts listening.

pageSize.description: Number of upstream items requested per scan page.

concurrency.description: Maximum number of upstream libraries scanned at the same time.

incrementalSafetySeconds.description: Overlap window applied to incremental MinDateLastSaved refreshes to avoid missing changes during a previous scan.

onStart.description: Run an incremental refresh in the background after startup.

intervalMinutes.description: Run incremental refreshes at this interval. Set to 0 to disable.

fullScanIntervalMinutes.description: Run slower full reconciliation scans at this interval to remove deleted upstream items. Set to 0 to disable.

libraries.description: Optional bridge-visible libraries that merge one or more upstream libraries.

collectionType.description: Jellyfin collection type for the merged bridge library.

sources.description: Upstream libraries to expose as this bridge library.

server.description: Upstream id from the upstreams list.

libraryId.description: Real Jellyfin library id from the upstream server.
